name: SQL Primer Playground
summary: Browser-based SQL playground with seeded membership sample data for learning SELECT, JOIN, and aggregation.
scope: Supabase PostgreSQL with pre-seeded tables: members, memberships, products, orders
Read-only query execution via Supabase RPC run_readonly_query(sql text)
Query editor with Run button and results rendered in shadcn Table
Schema browser listing all 4 tables and their column names
Client-side SELECT-only guard as backup to server-side validation
Three starter example queries as clickable Badge chips
Row count displayed in results footer
nonGoals: No custom CSS files — Tailwind utility classes only
No multi-statement scripts or DDL from the editor
No pixel-perfect design during Cursor build — Lovable owns beautification
No production hardening or rate limiting
constraints: Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui + React Router
Supabase PostgreSQL backend with anon key
SELECT-only queries enforced client-side and in Postgres RPC
Migrations pre-deployed — agent wires client only, does not recreate DB
snake_case SQL identifiers for all table and column names
acceptanceCriteria: App loads with schema browser showing all 4 tables and column names
SELECT * FROM members LIMIT 5 returns 5 rows in under 2 seconds
A JOIN query across members and memberships returns correct rows
DROP TABLE members shows a friendly error and schema remains unchanged
Example query chips populate the editor and run successfully
